hash_scope: canonical mockup body excluding gospel block (between GOSPEL_BLOCK_START and GOSPEL_BLOCK_END sentinels, inclusive)
notes: V9 canonical asset board mockup. Body hash excludes the top gospel block so governance wording can evolve without changing the approved design fingerprint. To change the canonical body intentionally: (1) make the change, (2) recompute body_sha256, (3) update this manifest, (4) reference the change in decisions_log.md as an amendment in the same commit. To change to V10: create V10_CANONICAL_MOCKUP.html, archive this file to docs/design/archive/, update canonical_version + canonical_path + body_sha256 in this manifest.
